description: Initial execution result for task task5

data.task_objective: Create the Email Generation Module: define templates and AI prompt flows for automated interview invitations and follow-up communications.
data.context:
Task task0:
  Objective: Define the database schema for job descriptions, candidate resumes, interview sessions, AI-generated questions, candidate responses, evaluation scores, email logs, and final reports.
  Result: ```json
{
  "schemas": {
    "job_descriptions": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": {
        "job_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Unique identifier for the job description",
          "primaryKey": true
        },
        "title": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Job title"
        },
        "description": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Full job description text"
        },
        "requirements": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Job requirements"
        },
        "responsibilities": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Job responsibilities"
        },
        "department": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Department the job belongs to"
        },
        "location": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Job location"
        },
        "date_posted": {
          "type": "string",
          "format": "date",
          "description": "Date the job was posted"
        },
        "embedding": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "type": "number"
          },
          "description": "Vector embedding of the job description"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "job_id",
        "title",
        "description"
      ]
    },
    "candidate_resumes": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": {
        "candidate_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Unique identifier for the candidate",
          "primaryKey": true
        },
        "name": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Candidate's full name"
        },
        "email": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Candidate's email address"
        },
        "phone": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Candidate's phone number"
        },
        "resume_text": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Full text of the candidate's resume"
        },
        "skills": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "description": "List of skills extracted from the resume"
        },
        "experience": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Candidate's work experience"
        },
        "education": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Candidate's education details"
        },
        "embedding": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "type": "number"
          },
          "description": "Vector embedding of the resume"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "candidate_id",
        "name",
        "email",
        "resume_text"
      ]
    },
    "interview_sessions": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": {
        "session_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Unique identifier for the interview session",
          "primaryKey": true
        },
        "candidate_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Foreign key referencing candidate_resumes"
        },
        "job_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Foreign key referencing job_descriptions"
        },
        "start_time": {
          "type": "string",
          "format": "date-time",
          "description": "Timestamp of when the interview started"
        },
        "end_time": {
          "type": "string",
          "format": "date-time",
          "description": "Timestamp of when the interview ended"
        },
        "status": {
          "type": "string",
          "enum": [
            "scheduled",
            "in_progress",
            "completed",
            "cancelled"
          ],
          "description": "Status of the interview session"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "session_id",
        "candidate_id",
        "job_id",
        "start_time"
      ]
    },
    "ai_generated_questions": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": {
        "question_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Unique identifier for the question",
          "primaryKey": true
        },
        "session_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Foreign key referencing interview_sessions"
        },
        "question_text": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "The text of the question generated by AI"
        },
        "question_type": {
          "type": "string",
          "enum": [
            "technical",
            "behavioral",
            "follow_up"
          ],
          "description": "Type of question"
        },
        "expected_answer": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "The expected answer or keywords for the question"
        },
         "topic": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Topic of the question"
        },
        "difficulty": {
          "type": "string",
          "enum": ["easy", "medium", "hard"],
          "description": "Difficulty level of the question"
         }
      },
      "required": [
        "question_id",
        "session_id",
        "question_text",
        "question_type"
      ]
    },
    "candidate_responses": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": {
        "response_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Unique identifier for the response",
          "primaryKey": true
        },
        "session_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Foreign key referencing interview_sessions"
        },
        "question_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Foreign key referencing ai_generated_questions"
        },
        "response_text": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "The candidate's answer to the question"
        },
        "timestamp": {
          "type": "string",
          "format": "date-time",
          "description": "Timestamp of when the response was recorded"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "response_id",
        "session_id",
        "question_id",
        "response_text"
      ]
    },
    "evaluation_scores": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": {
        "score_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Unique identifier for the score",
          "primaryKey": true
        },
        "session_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Foreign key referencing interview_sessions"
        },
         "question_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Foreign key referencing ai_generated_questions"
        },
        "category": {
          "type": "string",
          "enum": [
            "relevance",
            "depth",
            "confidence",
            "technical_accuracy",
            "communication_skills",
            "problem_solving"
          ],
          "description": "Category being evaluated"
        },
        "score": {
          "type": "number",
          "description": "Score for the category (e.g., 1-5 scale)"
        },
        "justification": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Explanation or justification for the score"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "score_id",
        "session_id",
        "category",
        "score"
      ]
    },
    "email_logs": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": {
        "email_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Unique identifier for the email",
          "primaryKey": true
        },
        "candidate_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Foreign key referencing candidate_resumes"
        },
        "email_type": {
          "type": "string",
          "enum": [
            "invitation",
            "follow_up",
            "rejection",
            "offer"
          ],
          "description": "Type of email"
        },
        "subject": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Email subject"
        },
        "body": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Email body text"
        },
        "timestamp": {
          "type": "string",
          "format": "date-time",
          "description": "Timestamp of when the email was sent"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "email_id",
        "candidate_id",
        "email_type",
        "subject",
        "body",
        "timestamp"
      ]
    },
    "final_reports": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": {
        "report_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Unique identifier for the final report",
          "primaryKey": true
        },
        "candidate_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Foreign key referencing candidate_resumes"
        },
        "job_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Foreign key referencing job_descriptions"
        },
        "session_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Foreign key referencing interview_sessions"
        },
        "resume_job_match_analysis": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Analysis of how well the resume matches the job description"
        },
        "interview_summary": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Summary of the interview session"
        },
        "technical_assessment": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Assessment of the candidate's technical skills"
        },
        "behavioral_assessment": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Assessment of the candidate's behavioral traits"
        },
        "strengths": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "List of the candidate's strengths"
        },
        "weaknesses": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "List of the candidate's weaknesses"
        },
        "final_recommendation": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Final recommendation (e.g., hire, no hire, further review)"
        },
        "overall_score": {
          "type": "number",
          "description": "Overall score for the candidate"
        },
        "scoring_breakdown": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Detailed breakdown of the scoring across different categories (JSON format)"
        },
         "report_generation_date": {
          "type": "string",
          "format": "date-time",
          "description": "Timestamp of when the report was generated"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "report_id",
        "candidate_id",
        "job_id",
        "session_id"
      ]
    }
  }
}
```
Task task1:
  Objective: Design the RESTful API specification (endpoints, request/response models) for core operations: ingesting jobs/resumes, orchestrating interviews, submitting responses, scoring, emailing, and retrieving reports.
  Result: ```yaml
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: AI-Driven Interview and Candidate Evaluation System API
  version: 1.0.0
  description: RESTful API for managing jobs, resumes, interviews, evaluations, and reports.

paths:
  /jobs:
    post:
      summary: Ingest a new job description
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                job_title:
                  type: string
                  description: Title of the job
                job_description:
                  type: string
                  description: Detailed description of the job
                department:
                  type: string
                  description: Department for the job
                location:
                  type: string
                  description: Job location
                skills:
                  type: array
                  items:
                    type: string
                  description: List of required skills
              example:
                job_title: Software Engineer
                job_description: Develop and maintain software applications.  Experience with Python and Javascript required.
                department: Engineering
                location: New York, NY
                skills: [Python, Javascript, React, AWS]
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Job created successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  job_id:
                    type: string
                    description: Unique identifier for the job
                example:
                  job_id: job123
        '400':
          description: Invalid request

    get:
      summary: Retrieve a list of all jobs
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of jobs retrieved successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  type: object
                  properties:
                    job_id:
                      type: string
                      description: Unique identifier for the job
                    job_title:
                      type: string
                      description: Title of the job
                    job_description:
                      type: string
                      description: Detailed description of the job
                    department:
                      type: string
                      description: Department for the job
                    location:
                      type: string
                      description: Job location
                    skills:
                      type: array
                      items:
                        type: string
                      description: List of required skills
                  example:
                    job_id: job123
                    job_title: Software Engineer
                    job_description: Develop and maintain software applications.  Experience with Python and Javascript required.
                    department: Engineering
                    location: New York, NY
                    skills: [Python, Javascript, React, AWS]

  /jobs/{job_id}:
    get:
      summary: Retrieve a specific job by ID
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: job_id
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
          description: Unique identifier for the job
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Job retrieved successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  job_id:
                    type: string
                    description: Unique identifier for the job
                  job_title:
                    type: string
                    description: Title of the job
                  job_description:
                    type: string
                    description: Detailed description of the job
                  department:
                    type: string
                    description: Department for the job
                  location:
                    type: string
                    description: Job location
                  skills:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      type: string
                    description: List of required skills
                example:
                  job_id: job123
                  job_title: Software Engineer
                  job_description: Develop and maintain software applications.  Experience with Python and Javascript required.
                  department: Engineering
                  location: New York, NY
                  skills: [Python, Javascript, React, AWS]
        '404':
          description: Job not found

  /resumes:
    post:
      summary: Ingest a new candidate resume
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                candidate_name:
                  type: string
                  description: Name of the candidate
                resume_text:
                  type: string
                  description: Text content of the resume
                email:
                  type: string
                  format: email
                  description: Candidate's email address
                skills:
                  type: array
                  items:
                    type: string
                  description: List of skills extracted from the resume
              example:
                candidate_name: John Doe
                resume_text: Experienced software engineer with Python and Javascript skills.
                email: john.doe@example.com
                skills: [Python, Javascript, SQL]
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Resume created successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  resume_id:
                    type: string
                    description: Unique identifier for the resume
                example:
                  resume_id: resume456
        '400':
          description: Invalid request
    get:
      summary: Retrieve a list of all resumes
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of resumes retrieved successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  type: object
                  properties:
                    resume_id:
                      type: string
                      description: Unique identifier for the resume
                    candidate_name:
                      type: string
                      description: Name of the candidate
                    resume_text:
                      type: string
                      description: Text content of the resume
                    email:
                      type: string
                      format: email
                      description: Candidate's email address
                    skills:
                      type: array
                      items:
                        type: string
                      description: List of skills extracted from the resume
                  example:
                    resume_id: resume456
                    candidate_name: John Doe
                    resume_text: Experienced software engineer with Python and Javascript skills.
                    email: john.doe@example.com
                    skills: [Python, Javascript, SQL]

  /resumes/{resume_id}:
    get:
      summary: Retrieve a specific resume by ID
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: resume_id
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
          description: Unique identifier for the resume
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Resume retrieved successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  resume_id:
                    type: string
                    description: Unique identifier for the resume
                  candidate_name:
                    type: string
                    description: Name of the candidate
                  resume_text:
                    type: string
                    description: Text content of the resume
                  email:
                    type: string
                    format: email
                    description: Candidate's email address
                  skills:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      type: string
                    description: List of skills extracted from the resume
                example:
                  resume_id: resume456
                  candidate_name: John Doe
                  resume_text: Experienced software engineer with Python and Javascript skills.
                  email: john.doe@example.com
                  skills: [Python, Javascript, SQL]
        '404':
          description: Resume not found

  /interviews:
    post:
      summary: Start a new interview session
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                job_id:
                  type: string
                  description: ID of the job for the interview
                resume_id:
                  type: string
                  description: ID of the candidate's resume
              example:
                job_id: job123
                resume_id: resume456
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Interview session started successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  interview_id:
                    type: string
                    description: Unique identifier for the interview session
                  first_question:
                    type: string
                    description: The first question to ask the candidate
                example:
                  interview_id: interview789
                  first_question: "Tell me about your experience with Python."
        '400':
          description: Invalid request
        '404':
          description: Job or Resume not found

  /interviews/{interview_id}/questions:
    get:
      summary: Get the current or next question in the interview
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: interview_id
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
          description: Unique identifier for the interview session
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Question retrieved successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  question:
                    type: string
                    description: The question to ask the candidate
                example:
                  question: "Explain the difference between '==' and '===' in Javascript."
        '404':
          description: Interview not found

  /interviews/{interview_id}/responses:
    post:
      summary: Submit a candidate's response to a question
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: interview_id
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
          description: Unique identifier for the interview session
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                question:
                  type: string
                  description: The question being answered.
                response:
                  type: string
                  description: The candidate's answer to the question
              example:
                question: "Explain the difference between '==' and '===' in Javascript."
                response: "'==' compares values, while '===' compares values and types."
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Response submitted successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  next_question:
                    type: string
                    nullable: true
                    description: The next question to ask, or null if the interview is complete
                  evaluation:
                    type: object
                    description: Evaluation of the response
                    properties:
                      relevance:
                        type: number
                        format: float
                        description: Relevance score (0-1)
                      depth:
                        type: number
                        format: float
                        description: Depth score (0-1)
                      confidence:
                        type: number
                        format: float
                        description: Confidence score (0-1)
                      technical_accuracy:
                        type: number
                        format: float
                        description: Technical accuracy score (0-1)
                    example:
                      relevance: 0.9
                      depth: 0.8
                      confidence: 0.7
                      technical_accuracy: 0.95
                example:
                  next_question: "How would you optimize a slow SQL query?"
                  evaluation:
                    relevance: 0.9
                    depth: 0.8
                    confidence: 0.7
                    technical_accuracy: 0.95
        '400':
          description: Invalid request
        '404':
          description: Interview not found

  /interviews/{interview_id}/scores:
    get:
      summary: Retrieve the candidate's scores for the interview
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: interview_id
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
          description: Unique identifier for the interview session
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Scores retrieved successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  technical_score:
                    type: number
                    format: float
                    description: Overall technical score
                  behavioral_score:
                    type: number
                    format: float
                    description: Overall behavioral score
                  overall_score:
                    type: number
                    format: float
                    description: Overall score
                  category_scores:
                    type: object
                    description: Scores for individual categories
                    properties:
                      problem_solving:
                        type: number
                        format: float
                        description: Problem-solving score
                      communication:
                        type: number
                        format: float
                        description: Communication score
                    example:
                      problem_solving: 0.85
                      communication: 0.9
                example:
                  technical_score: 0.8
                  behavioral_score: 0.9
                  overall_score: 0.85
                  category_scores:
                    problem_solving: 0.85
                    communication: 0.9
        '404':
          description: Interview not found

  /emails/invite:
    post:
      summary: Generate and send an interview invitation email
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                candidate_email:
                  type: string
                  format: email
                  description: Candidate's email address
                job_title:
                  type: string
                  description: Job title
                interview_date:
                  type: string
                  format: date-time
                  description: Date and time of the interview
                interviewer_name:
                  type: string
                  description: Name of the interviewer
              example:
                candidate_email: john.doe@example.com
                job_title: Software Engineer
                interview_date: "2024-01-20T10:00:00Z"
                interviewer_name: Jane Smith
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Email sent successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  message:
                    type: string
                    description: Confirmation message
                example:
                  message: "Interview invitation email sent to john.doe@example.com"
        '400':
          description: Invalid request
        '500':
          description: Email sending failed

  /emails/followup:
    post:
      summary: Generate and send a follow-up email to the candidate
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                candidate_email:
                  type: string
                  format: email
                  description: Candidate's email address
                interview_id:
                  type: string
                  description: Interview ID
              example:
                candidate_email: john.doe@example.com
                interview_id: interview789
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Email sent successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  message:
                    type: string
                    description: Confirmation message
                example:
                  message: "Follow-up email sent to john.doe@example.com"
        '400':
          description: Invalid request
        '500':
          description: Email sending failed

  /reports/{interview_id}:
    get:
      summary: Retrieve the final candidate evaluation report
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: interview_id
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
          description: Unique identifier for the interview session
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Report retrieved successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  resume_job_match_analysis:
                    type: string
                    description: Analysis of how well the resume matches the job description
                  interview_summary:
                    type: string
                    description: Summary of the interview
                  technical_assessment:
                    type: string
                    description: Assessment of the candidate's technical skills
                  behavioral_assessment:
                    type: string
                    description: Assessment of the candidate's behavioral traits
                  strengths:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      type: string
                    description: List of the candidate's strengths
                  weaknesses:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      type: string
                    description: List of the candidate's weaknesses
                  final_recommendation:
                    type: string
                    description: Final recommendation (Hire/No Hire/Maybe)
                  scoring_breakdown:
                    type: object
                    description: Detailed breakdown of the candidate's scores
                    properties:
                      technical_score:
                        type: number
                        format: float
                        description: Overall technical score
                      behavioral_score:
                        type: number
                        format: float
                        description: Overall behavioral score
                      overall_score:
                        type: number
                        format: float
                        description: Overall score
                    example:
                      technical_score: 0.8
                      behavioral_score: 0.9
                      overall_score: 0.85
                example:
                  resume_job_match_analysis: "The candidate's resume closely matches the job description, with strong skills in Python and Javascript."
                  interview_summary: "The candidate performed well in the interview, demonstrating strong technical knowledge and communication skills."
                  technical_assessment: "The candidate has a solid understanding of software engineering principles and is proficient in Python and Javascript."
                  behavioral_assessment: "The candidate is a good communicator and works well in a team environment."
                  strengths: ["Technical Skills", "Communication", "Problem Solving"]
                  weaknesses: ["Lack of experience with AWS"]
                  final_recommendation: "Hire"
                  scoring_breakdown:
                    technical_score: 0.8
                    behavioral_score: 0.9
                    overall_score: 0.85

```python
# email_generation_module.py

from typing import Dict
import datetime

class EmailGenerator:
    """
    Generates email content for interview invitations and follow-ups.
    """

    def __init__(self, llm_client=None):
        """
        Initializes the EmailGenerator with an optional LLM client.

        Args:
            llm_client: An optional client for interacting with a Language Model.
        """
        self.llm_client = llm_client

    def generate_invitation_email(self, candidate_email: str, job_title: str, interview_date: datetime.datetime, interviewer_name: str) -> Dict[str, str]:
        """
        Generates an interview invitation email.

        Args:
            candidate_email: The candidate's email address.
            job_title: The title of the job.
            interview_date: The date and time of the interview.
            interviewer_name: The name of the interviewer.

        Returns:
            A dictionary containing the subject and body of the email.
        """
        subject = f"Interview Invitation for {job_title} at [Company Name]"
        body = f"""
        Dear {candidate_email.split('@')[0]},

        We are pleased to invite you to an interview for the {job_title} position at [Company Name].

        The interview is scheduled for {interview_date.strftime("%Y-%m-%d at %H:%M")}.
        The interviewer will be {interviewer_name}.

        Please confirm your availability by replying to this email.

        We look forward to meeting you!

        Best regards,
        [Your Name/Company Name]
        """
        return {"subject": subject, "body": body}

    def generate_followup_email(self, candidate_email: str) -> Dict[str, str]:
        """
        Generates a follow-up email after the interview.  Optionally uses an LLM
        to personalize the message.

        Args:
            candidate_email: The candidate's email address.

        Returns:
            A dictionary containing the subject and body of the email.
        """
        subject = "Following Up on Your Interview"

        if self.llm_client:
            # Example of using an LLM to generate a personalized follow-up
            prompt = f"""
            Write a short, professional follow-up email to a candidate with email {candidate_email} after an interview.  Express gratitude for their time and mention that the team is reviewing candidates. Keep it concise (under 100 words).
            """
            try:
                body = self.llm_client.generate_text(prompt) # Assuming llm_client has a generate_text method
            except Exception as e:
                print(f"Error generating follow-up with LLM: {e}")
                body = f"""
                Dear {candidate_email.split('@')[0]},

                Thank you for taking the time to interview with us.  We are currently reviewing all candidates and will be in touch soon.

                Sincerely,
                [Your Name/Company Name]
                """
        else:
            body = f"""
            Dear {candidate_email.split('@')[0]},

            Thank you for taking the time to interview with us. We appreciate you learning more about the {candidate_email} role with out team. We are currently reviewing all candidates and will be in touch soon.

            Sincerely,
            [Your Name/Company Name]
            """
        return {"subject": subject, "body": body}


class AIPoweredEmailGenerator:
    """
    Generates email content with more sophisticated AI prompts.
    Leverages LLMs for dynamic content creation.
    """

    def __init__(self, llm_client):
        """
        Initializes the AIPoweredEmailGenerator with an LLM client.

        Args:
            llm_client: A client for interacting with a Language Model (required).
        """
        self.llm_client = llm_client
        if not self.llm_client:
            raise ValueError("LLM client is required for AIPoweredEmailGenerator")


    def generate_personalized_invitation(self, candidate_name: str, job_title: str, interview_date: str, job_description: str, company_culture: str) -> Dict[str, str]:
        """
        Generates highly personalized invitation emails, referencing job details
        and company culture to engage candidates.

        Args:
            candidate_name (str): Name of candidate.
            job_title (str): Job title.
            interview_date (str): Interview date and time.
            job_description (str): Description of the job.
            company_culture (str): Brief description of the company culture.

        Returns:
            Dict[str, str]: Subject and body of the email.
        """
        prompt = f"""
        Compose a personalized interview invitation email to {candidate_name} for the {job_title} position.
        Mention the interview is scheduled for {interview_date}.
        Briefly highlight key aspects of the job from this description: {job_description}.
        Incorporate a sentence about our company culture: {company_culture}.
        The email should be professional, enthusiastic, and encourage the candidate to confirm their attendance.
        Keep it concise (around 150 words).
        """
        email_content = self.llm_client.generate_text(prompt)
        subject_prompt = f"Write subject line for the following email content: {email_content}"
        subject = self.llm_client.generate_text(subject_prompt)


        return {"subject": subject, "body": email_content}


    def generate_interview_feedback_request(self, interviewer_name: str, candidate_name: str, job_title: str) -> Dict[str, str]:
        """
        Generates an email requesting feedback from the interviewer after
        the interview.

        Args:
            interviewer_name (str): Name of the interviewer.
            candidate_name (str): Name of the candidate.
            job_title (str): Job title.

        Returns:
            Dict[str, str]: Subject and body of the feedback request email.
        """
        prompt = f"""
        Compose an email to {interviewer_name} requesting feedback on the interview with {candidate_name} for the {job_title} position.
        Ask for specific feedback on the candidate's technical skills, communication abilities, and overall fit for the role.
        Mention the importance of their feedback in the decision-making process.
        Set a deadline for providing feedback (e.g., within 2 days).
        Keep the email concise and professional.
        """
        email_content = self.llm_client.generate_text(prompt)
        subject_prompt = f"Write subject line for the following email content: {email_content}"
        subject = self.llm_client.generate_text(subject_prompt)

        return {"subject": subject, "body": email_content}


class ExampleLLMClient:  # Dummy LLM client for testing purposes
    def generate_text(self, prompt: str) -> str:
        """
        A mock LLM client that returns a canned response.

        Args:
            prompt: The prompt provided

        Returns:
            A string containing the generated text.
        """
        if "follow-up email" in prompt:
            return "Dear [Candidate Name], Thank you for your time. We are reviewing applications."
        elif "invitation email" in prompt:
            return "Dear [Candidate Name], We invite you to interview on [Date]."
        elif "Write subject line" in prompt:
            return "Generated Subject Line"
        elif "interview feedback" in prompt:
             return "Dear [Interviewer Name], Please provide feedback on [Candidate Name]."
        else:
            return f"LLM Response to: {prompt}"



if __name__ == '__main__':
    # Example Usage
    generator = EmailGenerator()
    invitation = generator.generate_invitation_email(
        "test@example.com", "Software Engineer", datetime.datetime(2024, 1, 20, 10, 0, 0), "Jane Smith"
    )
    print("Invitation Email:")
    print(f"Subject: {invitation['subject']}")
    print(f"Body: {invitation['body']}")

    followup = generator.generate_followup_email("test@example.com")
    print("\nFollow-up Email:")
    print(f"Subject: {followup['subject']}")
    print(f"Body: {followup['body']}")

    # Example Usage with LLM
    llm_client = ExampleLLMClient()
    ai_generator = EmailGenerator(llm_client=llm_client)
    followup_llm = ai_generator.generate_followup_email("test@example.com")
    print("\nFollow-up Email (with LLM):")
    print(f"Subject: {followup_llm['subject']}")
    print(f"Body: {followup_llm['body']}")

    # Example Usage of AIPoweredEmailGenerator
    advanced_generator = AIPoweredEmailGenerator(llm_client=llm_client)
    personalized_invitation = advanced_generator.generate_personalized_invitation(
        candidate_name="Alice Johnson",
        job_title="Data Scientist",
        interview_date="January 25, 2024",
        job_description="Analyze large datasets and build machine learning models.",
        company_culture="Innovative, collaborative, and data-driven."
    )

    print("\nPersonalized Invitation (AIPoweredEmailGenerator):")
    print(f"Subject: {personalized_invitation['subject']}")
    print(f"Body: {personalized_invitation['body']}")

    feedback_request = advanced_generator.generate_interview_feedback_request(
        interviewer_name="Bob Williams",
        candidate_name="Alice Johnson",
        job_title="Data Scientist"
    )

    print("\nInterview Feedback Request (AIPoweredEmailGenerator):")
    print(f"Subject: {feedback_request['subject']}")
    print(f"Body: {feedback_request['body']}")
